translations.en: a colorfully clad, bemused looking gypsy.
translations.zh: 穿著色彩鮮艷、神情迷糊的吉普賽人。

translations.en: "Hey, paisan! If you were looking to geta your @fortune told, you came to the right place."
translations.zh: 「嘿，老鄉！若你想算@命，算是來對地方了。」
translations.note: 義大利口音：paisan（同鄉），語助詞 geta→to get

translations.en: "I'ma called Arturos. That meansa either 'foolish monkey' or 'he who sells cheese', depending on howa you @translate it."
translations.zh: 「俺叫阿圖羅斯。依照@翻譯方式不同，這個名字的意思或是『蠢猴子』，或是『賣乳酪的人』。」

translations.en: "Yeah, go figure, huh?"
translations.zh: 「是吧，想不到吧？」

translations.en: "Yeah, I used to have a map like that. Can't remember what I did with it, though..."
translations.zh: 「是啊，俺以前有張那樣的地圖。但不記得放哪了……」

translations.en: "Map. Hmm, map... Oh yeah, thata old thing. Sure, I got that, but she'sa not very interesting."
translations.zh: 「地圖。嗯，地圖……哦對，那個舊東西。是啊，俺有，但那不太有趣。」

translations.en: "Ima the king of all the gypsies."
translations.zh: 「俺是所有吉普賽人的王。」

translations.en: "Of course, thatsa what you call more of an 'honorary' @title, so I tell @fortunes on the side."
translations.zh: 「當然，那頭@銜比較算是……榮譽性的，所以俺副業是算@命。」

translations.en: "You cana just call me '@Uncle @Arthur' if you like."
translations.zh: 「你也可以叫俺『@阿叔@亞瑟』，若你喜歡的話。」

translations.en: "He's a whadda you call, an impostor. You shouldn'ta listen to him."
translations.zh: 「他是……怎麼說，一個冒充者。你不應該聽他的。」

translations.en: "That'sa nice and friendly. I like you too." He comes over and gives you a big hug.
translations.zh: 「那很好，很親切。俺也喜歡你。」他走過來給你一個大擁抱。

translations.en: "Hey, you come again soon, okay?"
translations.zh: 「嘿，要快快再來啊！」

translations.en: Shamino whispers to you, "Best check your coinpouch. I think I saw something when that gypsy hugged you."
translations.zh: 夏米諾低聲對你說：「最好查查你的錢袋。那個吉普賽人擁抱你時，我好像看見了什麼。」

translations.en: "The silver tablet? I don't know anything about that."
translations.zh: 「銀板？俺對那個一無所知。」

translations.en: "But hey, maybe there's something in the @cards about it, ah?"
translations.zh: 「但嘿，也許@牌裡有它的消息，對不？」

translations.en: "Can'ta you think of something more interesting to talk about?"
translations.zh: 「你就不能想個更有趣的話題嗎？」

translations.en: "I gota this fine set of fortune telling cards. These werea hand painted by Musgrave himself."
translations.zh: 「俺有一套精美的占卜牌。這些可是穆斯格雷夫親手繪製的。」

translations.en: "For justa two gold,
translations.zh: 「只要兩枚金幣，

translations.en: maybe I can help you finda this silver tablet."
translations.zh: 也許俺能幫你找到那塊銀板。」

translations.en: "And I'll tell you the rest of your future as well. What a bargain! Whadda you say?"
translations.zh: 「而且俺還會告訴你未來的其餘部分。多划算！你說呢？」

translations.en: I'll tella you your future. Whadda you say?"
translations.zh: 俺來告訴你你的未來。你說呢？」

translations.en: "Ok, have it your way."
translations.zh: 「好吧，隨你。」

translations.en: "But ifa some maniac with an axe catches you in a dark alley somewhere, don'ta blame me for not warning you."
translations.zh: 「但若哪天某個拿斧頭的瘋子在黑暗小巷抓住你，別怪俺沒提醒你。」

translations.en: "Come back whena you have the money."
translations.zh: 「等你有錢了再來。」

translations.en: He takes out a deck of cards, shuffles it, and has you pick one.
translations.zh: 他取出一副牌，洗過後讓你抽一張。

translations.en: "Okay, thisa card, she'sa the Tower. That means you'rea going to go into a real big building soon, like maybe a castle."
translations.zh: 「好，這張牌嘛，是塔牌。那意思是你很快就要進入一棟很大的建築，比如說城堡。」

translations.en: "Pretty good, huh? Maybe you want a better card, though. Do you want to pick again?"
translations.zh: 「不錯吧？不過也許你想要張更好的。要再抽一張嗎？」

translations.en: "Okay."
translations.zh: 「好啊。」

translations.en: You pick another card. "This here isa the Wheel of Fortune."
translations.zh: 你又抽了一張。「這張嘛，是命運之輪。」

translations.en: "Wheels, they go 'round and 'round, so that means you'rea gonna have some good luck, and some bad luck."
translations.zh: 「輪子嘛，它轉啊轉的，所以那意味著你會有些好運，也會有些壞運。」

translations.en: "That doesn't tell you so much. Try for another card?"
translations.zh: 「那沒說太多。再試一張嗎？」

translations.en: "Oh, hey, you picked the Lovers this time. I thinka maybe you should go talk to
translations.zh: 「哦，嘿，你這次抽到了戀人。俺覺得你也許應該去找

translations.en: Andreas
translations.zh: 安德烈亞斯

translations.en: Wanda
translations.zh: 汪達

translations.en: , you know what I mean?"
translations.zh: ，你懂俺的意思嗎？」

translations.en: "That'sa pretty good card. How about another one?"
translations.zh: 「那是張不錯的牌。再來一張怎樣？」

translations.en: "This here's Temperance. Thata means that you shouldn't lose your temper."
translations.zh: 「這張是節制。那意味著你不應該失去耐性。」

translations.en: "I cana find you a better card than that, here, wait a minute."
translations.zh: 「俺可以幫你找到更好的牌，等一下。」

translations.en: He picks out a card. "This is Justice, that'sa one of what they call the 'court cards.' Let me try again." He picks another.
translations.zh: 他挑出一張。「這是正義牌，那是所謂的『宮廷牌』之一。俺再試試。」他又挑了一張。

translations.en: "Okay, this isa better. This is the Hierophant. That'sa like an elephant, but taller and without the trunk."
translations.zh: 「好，這張好多了。這是教皇牌。那就像頭大象，只是更高而且沒有象鼻。」
translations.note: Hierophant（教皇）被他誤解為elephant（大象）的幽默

translations.en: "That means you'rea gonna see one of them someday. Pretty interesting, huh? Another card?"
translations.zh: 「那意味著你某天會看到一頭。很有意思吧？再來一張？」

translations.en: "Uh-oh, you justa drew the Death card. That means eithera you're going to kill somebody soon, ora somebody's gonna kill you."
translations.zh: 「哎喲，你剛抽到了死神牌。那意味著你快要殺人，或者有人快要殺你。」

translations.en: "I can never geta that part straight. One more card?"
translations.zh: 「俺從來搞不清哪個是哪個。再一張？」

translations.en: "Allaright, now we're talking. You pickeda the Crow card. That'sa telling you adventuring isa for the birds."
translations.zh: 「好吧，現在有意思了。你抽到了烏鴉牌。那是在告訴你冒險不過是鳥兒的玩意兒。」
translations.note: for the birds=無聊/沒意義（俚語）

translations.en: "You should open a little shop somewhere and settle down, you know?"
translations.zh: 「你應該找個地方開家小店、安定下來，你懂嗎？」

translations.en: "The cards didn't say nothin' about the silver tablet. Guess that means you're not gonna find it."
translations.zh: 「牌裡對銀板隻字未提。看來你大概找不到它了。」

translations.en: "That's life, you know?"
translations.zh: 「人生就是這樣，你說呢？」

translations.en: "Okay, that'sa #0 extra cards at 5 gold apiece. That makes #1 total."
translations.zh: 「好，那是#0張額外的牌，每張5枚金幣。合計#1枚。」

translations.en: "Since you don'ta have that much, I'll just settle for what you've got."
translations.zh: 「既然你沒那麼多，俺就將就收你有的吧。」

translations.en: "It was a pleasure doinga business with you."
translations.zh: 「和你做生意很愉快。」

translations.en: "Say--do you want to buy it?"
translations.zh: 「說說——你想買嗎？」

translations.en: "Nah, I didn't think so. What for would anybody want to buy it, ah?"
translations.zh: 「不，俺就知道。誰會想買它呢，對不？」

translations.en: "Oh! Well, sure you do, she's a very important map!"
translations.zh: 「哦！好啊，你當然要，這是張非常重要的地圖！」

translations.en: He leads you away from the rest of the group. "Don't want no spyin' ears, ah?"
translations.zh: 他把你帶離其他人。「不要讓人偷聽，對不？」

translations.en: "Yeah, this map, she'sa leading to the treasure of - oh, who was it, Yellowbeard or somebody."
translations.zh: 「是啊，這張地圖嘛，它通往——哦，是誰來著，黃鬍子還是什麼人的寶藏。」

translations.en: "Well, I forget, but the point is it leads to a big, huge treasure!"
translations.zh: 「好吧，俺忘了，但重點是它通往一大筆巨大的寶藏！」

translations.en: "So if you want this map you're agonna have to pay - 100 gold! Okay?"
translations.zh: 「所以若你想要這張地圖，就得付——100枚金幣！好嗎？」

translations.en: "Thank you! You have asaved me from amaking a big mistake!"
translations.zh: 「謝謝！你讓俺免於犯下一個大錯！」
translations.note: 買家拒絕時反說謝謝的幽默

translations.en: "You're right, I better hold on to this valuable map myself. No way is it worth less than 100 gold."
translations.zh: 「你說得對，俺還是自己留著這張珍貴地圖好了。它絕對不值少於100枚金幣。」

translations.en: "What, are you nuts? But okay, how'sabout just 50 gold?"
translations.zh: 「什麼，你瘋了？但好吧，那就只要50枚金幣怎樣？」

translations.en: "Well, I hate to see anybody pass up good fortune, so I tell you what I do."
translations.zh: 「好吧，俺不忍心看人錯過好運，所以俺告訴你俺怎麼做。」

translations.en: "I sell you this map, this key to infinite wealth, for just 75 gold. Okay?"
translations.zh: 「俺把這張地圖，這把通往無限財富的鑰匙，賣給你，只要75枚金幣。好嗎？」

translations.en: "Hey, what are you, a deadbeat? Come back when you can afford the map!"
translations.zh: 「嘿，你是個窮光蛋嗎？等你買得起這張地圖再來！」

translations.en: "Yeah, well, you've got a lot to carry right now."
translations.zh: 「是啊，你現在帶的東西已經很多了。」

translations.en: "I do you a favor and just hold on to the map for you until you got room for it."
translations.zh: 「俺幫你一個忙，先替你保管地圖，等你有地方放再說。」

translations.en: "I do you another favor and hold on to the money, too."
translations.zh: 「俺再幫你一個忙，也替你保管那筆錢。」

translations.en: "Okay, here's the map, and may fortune bring you lotsa gold!"
translations.zh: 「好，地圖給你，願財運為你帶來大把金幣！」

translator_notes: 阿圖羅斯是義大利腔騙子吉普賽人，說話充滿語助詞（thatsa/meansa/ima）。塔羅牌占卜場景詼諧荒誕，教皇牌被誤解為大象的笑話是核心幽默點。
